tasks.description: Call loadAggregated on verdict, task_status, and run_end events so stats auto-update
tasks.changes: In the handleEvent function, add loadAggregated() calls inside the verdict, task_status, and run_end event branches. Currently loadAggregated() is only called on subagent_done. Find the if-blocks for ev.type === 'verdict', ev.type === 'task_status', and ev.type === 'run_end' and add loadAggregated() at the end of each block.

tasks.description: Remove ensureWatchOpen() call from helot_run handler
tasks.changes: In the helot_run tool handler (the if block where name === 'helot_run'), remove the single line that calls ensureWatchOpen(). Do not change anything else in the file. Keep the ensureWatchOpen function definition.

tasks.description: Prevent browser reopening on every MCP server restart using a sentinel file
tasks.changes: In the server.listen callback, wrap the exec browser-open calls in a sentinel check. Before opening the browser, check: const sentinelPath = path.join(stateDir, 'dashboard.opened'); const shouldOpen = !fs.existsSync(sentinelPath) || (Date.now() - fs.statSync(sentinelPath).mtimeMs > 60_000); if shouldOpen is true, write fs.writeFileSync(sentinelPath, String(Date.now())) then exec the browser open. If false, skip. The stateDir variable is the parameter passed to startDashboard.
